message: ci: clone Commander dependency in workflows

files.patch:
@@ -21,6 +21,24 @@ jobs:
     - name: Checkout
       uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
+    - name: Checkout Commander dependency
+      uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      with:
+        repository: steipete/Commander
+        path: Commander
+
+    - name: Checkout Commander dependency
+      uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      with:
+        repository: steipete/Commander
+        path: Commander
+
+    - name: Checkout Commander dependency
+      uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      with:
+        repository: steipete/Commander
+        path: Commander
+
     - name: Select Xcode 16
       if: runner.os == 'macOS'
       run: sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode_16.1.app || sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode_16.0.app || sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode.app
@@ -85,6 +103,12 @@ jobs:

     - name: Select Xcode 16
